title: deploy.sh and export-pdf.sh ordering isn't documented
body: The usage comment at the top of scripts/deploy.sh just says pass a folder or an html file, but it doesn't say whether you're supposed to run scripts/export-pdf.sh before or after deploying, or whether the PDF export even works against a deployed Vercel URL vs a local folder.

title: deploy.sh fails confusingly when the sanitized deck name is empty
body: The DECK_NAME sanitization pipeline (lowercase, strip non [a-z0-9._-], collapse hyphens, trim) can produce an empty string if the input file/folder name is made entirely of special characters (e.g. '★★★.html'), and the subsequent `mv` and `vercel deploy` calls then fail with an unrelated-looking error instead of a clear 'could not derive a project name' message.

title: extract-pptx.py uses a magic number for picture shapes
body: extract_pptx() checks `shape.shape_type == 13` to detect pictures instead of the named python-pptx constant, and it misses images that are inside grouped shapes, so decks with grouped picture elements lose those images during extraction.

title: Duplicated deck-stage.js copies drift out of sync
body: bold-template-pack/deck-stage.js and plugins/frontend-slides/skills/frontend-slides/bold-template-pack/deck-stage.js appear to be byte-for-byte copies today, but nothing enforces that -- if one gets patched for a bug fix and the other doesn't, the skill-packaged copy silently regresses. Could one just import/require the other, or is there a build step that's supposed to sync them?
